title: The Bengal Ghatwali Land Act, 1859
full_text: The Bengal Ghatwali Land Act, 1859 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1859-05 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1859-03-04 Act Year: 1859 Short Title: The Bengal Ghatwali Land Act, 1859 Long Title: An Act to empower the holder of Ghatwalee lands in the District of Beerbhoom to grant leases extending beyond the period of their own possession. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 04-03-1859 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Bengal Ghatwali Land Act, 1859 Show all section Section 1. Ghatwals of Beerbhoom to have the same right of granting leases as is allowed to other proprietors of lands. Section 2. Court of Wards and Revenue authorities to have the like power in certain causes.
